## What

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR accomplish? Must be independently
meaningful — not "see title". -->

## Why

<!-- The problem being solved. What broke, what was slow, what was impossible
that should be possible. -->

## How (non-obvious decisions only)

<!-- Skip entirely if the diff speaks for itself. Otherwise: algorithmic
choices, tradeoffs, architectural decisions not visible in the code. -->

## Testing

<!-- What was tested and how. If there's a manual test path, spell it out.
For skill changes: which prompts did you exercise? -->

## Risks

<!-- Side effects, known limitations, anything intentionally not changed.
Rollback plan if non-obvious. -->

## References

<!-- Related issues, PRs, docs. Short list. -->
